description: Recurrence information for recurring events for products.

customerId.description: A unique customer ID for the customer to use for the recurrence action.

customerExternalId.description: A customer ID provided by an external system for the customer to use for the recurrence action.

contractId.description: A unique contract ID for the contract to use for the recurrence action.

contractExternalId.description: A contract ID provided by an external system for the contract to use for the recurrence action.

communicationIdType.description: Value of Communication type, for example E.164.

productId.description: A unique product id for the product to use for the recurrence action.

productExternalId.description: A product ID product by an external system for the product to use for the recurrence action.

items.description: Product price details corresponding to a product related to a contract.

productOfferingPriceExternalId.description: The product offering price external identifier.
